# BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BetaAppClipInvocation**: The relationship to the Beta App Clip Invocations resource you set with the request that creates a Beta App Clip Invocation Localizations resource.

## Objects

- **BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizationCreateRequest.Data.Attributes**: The attributes you set that describe the new Beta App Clip Invocation Localizations resource.
